10522608.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10522608.description: How do the FBI find a killer with no victim or geographic profile and who covers his trail with counter forensics. And if they can find him, how would they prove responsibility?

10523555.title: Judge Judy
10523555.description: A man sues for $5,000 because his neighbour's dog scratched and frightened his 12-year-old.

10523644.title: Cheaters
10523644.description: Lisa faces the ultimate betrayal when the detectives find her boyfriend and best friend together. Jared's other half, Tony, is proving elusive.

10524583.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10524583.description: Criminologists, psychologists, and detectives try to understand the twisted mindset of some of the world's most dangerous serial killers.

10525254.title: Judge Judy
10525254.description: A woman says her ex-lover used her debit card without permission. Then, a plaintiff accuses her boyfriend's brother of taking her vehicle without permission and returning it damaged.

10525319.title: Judge Judy
10525319.description: A contractor admits to drinking at work. Then, a man says he overpaid his ex-wife for child support.

10525436.title: Judge Judy
10525436.description: Former landlords accuse a woman of being a squatter in their rental unit. Then, a single mother accuses a co-worker of repossessing her vehicle illegally.

10526236.title: Something's Killing Me
10526236.description: Changes started subtly for twins Addi and Cassi, but after medical testing it was discovered they had a strange, genetic disease that causes progressive neurological deterioration.

10526423.title: Operation Repo
10526423.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10527273.title: Operation Repo
10527273.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10527410.title: Judge Judy
10527410.description: A niece sues her uncle for bail money and the cost of a child's party. A woman accuses her former roommate of assaulting her child and ruining her credit. A landlord sues a former tenant for utility bills and legal fees.

10528229.title: Judge Judy
10528229.description: A woman sues her newly blind son for a car loan that is in her name. Then, an ex-friend wants repayment for a loan and unpaid credit-card charges.

10528318.title: Judge Judy
10528318.description: A former couple argue about a car's down payment and a restraining order. Then, a landlady and an ex-tenant sue each other over a bicycle, property damage, rent and copyright infringement.

10528442.title: Judge Judy
10528442.description: A man sues his U.S. Army Reservist son and teen daughter-in-law for unpaid rent and says they accused him of stealing meat.

10529343.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10529343.description: The team head out during low tide to attempt the removal of a damaged pontoon, starting by pumping out the sand that is weighing it down.

10530283.title: Forensics NZ
10530283.description: Investigators follow multiple leads as they look into the disappearance of a woman from an Auckland motel. They discover the woman's dangerous, criminal world as they attempt to substantiate their case.

10530457.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10530457.description: Ghost hunters share the stories that led them to a career in the paranormal. A woman claims she used to experience nightly visits from a horned demon.

10531413.title: The Real Skinny
10531413.description: Follow super slimmers Sarah and Chris on the last leg of their journey as they undergo surgery to remove excess skin. Will this procedure finally give them the body they want?

10532329.title: Auction Kings
10532329.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

10532413.title: Auction Kings
10532413.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

10533238.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10533238.description: The team head out during low tide to attempt the removal of a damaged pontoon, starting by pumping out the sand that is weighing it down.

10533429.title: Celebrity Damage Control
10533429.description: When numerous women allege sexual harrassment against Schwarzenegger, his sterling reputation takes a hit, putting the Hollywood hero in need of some tough-as-nails damage control.

10534195.title: Judge Judy
10534195.description: A woman says her boyfriend unexpectedly married someone else and suggested that they all live together. A young man says his father stole $11,000 from his bank account.

10534277.title: Judge Judy
10534277.description: Teens fight over a missing laptop. After a car catches fire and explodes, the driver parked next to the disaster sues for damages to her own vehicle.

10535153.title: Judge Judy
10535153.description: Former drug-buddies fight over the cashing of fraudulent checks. A mother and daughter feud over repayment of a loan, utility bills and car damages.

10535240.title: Judge Judy
10535240.description: A man accuses his ex of being physically abusive and punching holes in the walls. A man says his landlord trespassed into his apartment and went through his wife's underwear bag.

10536082.title: Judge Judy
10536082.description: A man sues his ex for the return of a flat-screen TV, and she countersues, saying he threw a brick at her. A woman regrets lending a co-worker money to have breast-augmentation surgery.

10536159.title: Judge Judy
10536159.description: A woman says she broke a lease because her sister was too bossy, and landlord and tenant argue over whether two TVs were gifts or loans.

10536250.title: Operation Repo
10536250.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.
